services.auth module¶

Auth Service Module¶

This module provides a comprehensive authentication and authorization service using JWT (JSON Web Tokens), password hashing with bcrypt, and Redis caching.

class services.auth.Auth[source]¶

Bases: object

Handles password hashing, token generation, and user authentication.

ALGORITHM = 'HS256'¶
SECRET_KEY = 's'¶
create_access_token(data: dict, expires_delta: float | None = None)[source]¶

Generates a JWT access token.

Parameters:

  • data – Data to encode (usually user email).

  • expires_delta – Optional expiration time in seconds.

Returns:

Encoded JWT token.

create_email_token(data: dict)[source]¶

Generates a token for email verification valid for 24 hours.

Parameters:

data – Dictionary containing ‘sub’ (user email).

Returns:

Encoded JWT token.

create_refresh_token(data: dict, expires_delta: float | None = None)[source]¶

Generates a JWT refresh token valid for 7 days by default.

Parameters:

  • data – Data to encode.

  • expires_delta – Optional expiration time.

Returns:

Encoded JWT token.

create_reset_token(email: str)[source]¶

Generates a short-lived token (1 hour) for password reset.

Parameters:

email – User email address.

Returns:

Encoded JWT token.

decode_access_token(token: str)[source]¶

Generic JWT decoder.

Parameters:

token – Any JWT token.

Returns:

Payload dictionary if valid, else None.

get_current_user(token: str = Depends(dependency=<fastapi.security.oauth2.OAuth2PasswordBearer object>, use_cache=True, scope=None), db: Session = Depends(dependency=<function get_db>, use_cache=True, scope=None))[source]¶

Authenticates the current user via JWT.

Checks Redis cache first. If not found, fetches from database and caches the result.

Parameters:

  • token – The access token from the request header.

  • db – The database session.

Raises:

HTTPException – If credentials cannot be validated.

Returns:

The User object.

get_email_from_reset_token(token: str)[source]¶

Decodes a password reset token.

Parameters:

token – The reset JWT token.

Returns:

User email.

get_email_from_token(token: str)[source]¶

Decodes an email verification token and returns the email address.

Parameters:

token – The JWT email token.

Raises:

HTTPException – If token scope is invalid or expired.

Returns:

The user email (sub).

get_password_hash(password: str)[source]¶

Generates a bcrypt hash from a plain password.

Parameters:

password – Plain text password.

Returns:

Hashed password string.

oauth2_scheme = <fastapi.security.oauth2.OAuth2PasswordBearer object>¶
pwd_context = <CryptContext>¶
verify_password(plain_password, hashed_password)[source]¶

Verifies if a plain password matches the stored hash.

Parameters:

  • plain_password – The password provided by the user.

  • hashed_password – The hashed password from the database.

Returns:

True if match, False otherwise.

class services.auth.RoleChecker(allowed_roles: list[UserRole])[source]¶

Bases: object

Dependency to restrict access to specific user roles.
